[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000010 2
1 11111011 7
2 01100101 4
3 11111111 a
4 01000101 3
5 01011010 4
6 11111011 7
7 01100101 4

01 10 01010101 4
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 01000010 2 match 0
34 43 01100001 3
45 54 00100000 1
56 65 00001000 1
67 76 00011000 2
70 07 00010000 1

02 20 01000010 2 match 0
13 31 01011001 4
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 10101000 3
46 64 00000000 a
57 75 00001000 1
60 06 00010000 1
71 17 00011000 2

03 30 01010011 4
14 41 01000101 3 match 4
25 52 00000000 a
36 63 00011000 2
47 74 00000000 a
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 00011000 2
72 27 00000000 a

04 40 01000101 3 match 4
15 51 00001000 1
26 62 00000000 a
37 73 00011000 2
